verses.2: She weeps bitterly in the night.
verses.3: Judah has gone into captivity because of affliction
verses.5: Her adversaries have become the head.
verses.6: All majesty has departed from the daughter of Zion.
verses.7: Jerusalem remembers in the days of her affliction and of her miseries
verses.9: Her filthiness was in her skirts.
verses.10: The adversary has spread out his hand on all her pleasant things;
verses.12: “Is it nothing to you, all you who pass by?
verses.13: “From on high has he sent fire into my bones,
verses.14: “The yoke of my transgressions is bound by his hand.
verses.15: “The Lord has set at nothing all my mighty men within me.
verses.20: “Look, LORD; for I am in distress.
verses.22: “Let all their wickedness come before you.
